name: neuroarts
description: Wellness and mindfulness tools from NeuroArts Interactive, brought into Claude. Home of the MizuMind plugin: a catalog of breathing, focus, and wind-down exercises, moment-matched session suggestions, and a private journal — each connected to your MizuMind account.

plugins.name: mizumind
plugins.description: Wellness inside Claude: browse the MizuMind catalog, get guided focus and breathing exercises, journal, and check in — connected to your MizuMind account.
